overview.mainTheme: 以個股新聞骨架彙整，宏觀利率資料仍不完整

core.news: Michael Burry of "The Big Short" Fame is Betting Against This Stock That's Soared 1,400% During the AI Boom So Far -- and Thinks It Could D…（Yahoo）
core.newsSummary: Earnings at this AI company are roaring higher.
core.judgement: 依新聞摘要初判：Earnings at this AI company are roaring higher.
core.observation: 留意 NVDA 是否延續 Yahoo 所反映的市場敘事。

core.news: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Micron Technology, Advanced Micro Devices, Hewlett Packard and Agilysys（Yahoo）
core.newsSummary: MU powers ahead as AI-driven demand fuels record growth, leading a surging integrated systems industry alongside AMD, HPE and AGYS.
core.judgement: 依新聞摘要初判：MU powers ahead as AI-driven demand fuels record growth, leading a surging integrated systems industry alongside AMD, HPE and AGYS.
core.observation: 留意 AMD 是否延續 Yahoo 所反映的市場敘事。

watch.news: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Eaton, Emerson Electric, Powell Industries and EnerSys（Yahoo）
watch.newsSummary: Eaton gains from AI data center demand as select electronics manufacturers outperform despite rising costs, supply-chain issues, and weak industry outlook.

watch.news: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: PC Rally Fades On Nvidia Denial（SeekingAlpha）
watch.newsSummary: PC stocks fall after Nvidia denies report in talks to buy a PC-focused company. United CEO teases interest in merger with American. Amazon said to be in advanced talks on Globalstar deal.
watch.judgement: 依新聞摘要初判：PC stocks fall after Nvidia denies report in talks to buy a PC-focused company. United CEO teases interest in merger with American. Amazon said to be in advanced talks on Globalstar deal.
watch.observation: 留意 GSAT 是否延續 SeekingAlpha 所反映的市場敘事。

watch.newsSummary: 最近沒有抓到可用新聞。
watch.observation: ZETA 暫時以價格與量能為主，等待更多催化。

actionSummary.coreView: 目前僅使用免費的 Finnhub 與 FRED 來源，關鍵決策仍需人工複核。
